_comment: Add these settings to the ApexRevenue CB App settings manifest

new_settings.name: giveControlEnabled
new_settings.title: Enable Give Control
new_settings.description: Allow fans to buy real-time toy control

new_settings.name: giveControlTokens
new_settings.title: Give Control Token Amount
new_settings.description: Exact tip amount to trigger Give Control

new_settings.name: giveControlDuration
new_settings.title: Give Control Duration (seconds)
new_settings.description: How long the fan controls the toy

new_settings.name: controlPageUrl
new_settings.title: Control Page URL
new_settings.description: URL for the fan Give Control interface

new_settings.name: syncEnabled
new_settings.title: Enable Fan Toy Sync
new_settings.description: Allow fans to sync their own toys with your vibes

new_settings.name: syncPageUrl
new_settings.title: Sync Page URL
new_settings.description: URL for the fan toy sync page

new_settings.name: syncAnnounceInterval
new_settings.title: Sync Announce Interval (minutes)
new_settings.description: How often to announce fan sync availability (0 = off)
